chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5161 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.21913/2020 2. For hearing of main case 19.05.2025 Ms. Romana, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Hafeezullah advocate holds brief for Mr. Toqeer Ahmed, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel submits under instructions that the application for refund claims shall be preferred before the competent authority. Learned counsel seeks that the application, once filed, be decided expeditiously after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
